mapper.select: select * from ( select id, device_id, iot_code, topic, partition_id, monitor_id, shaft_floor_id, data_reference, ied_full_path, collect_time, max_temp, min_temp, avg_temp, max_temp_position, min_temp_position, max_temp_channel, min_temp_channel, payload_json, deleted, created_on from ODS_DWEQ_DM_RAW_DATA_D where (deleted is null or deleted = 0) and collect_time >= #{from} and collect_time <= #{to} and (#{monitorId} is null or monitor_id = #{monitorId}) and (#{deviceId} is null or device_id = #{deviceId}) and (#{shaftFloorId} is null or shaft_floor_id = #{shaftFloorId}) and (#{partitionId} is null or partition_id = #{partitionId}) order by collect_time desc, id desc ) t where rownum <= #{limit}
